entries.title: growmax-skills
entries.description: Growmax team Claude Code skills and workflows. Auto-discovers skills/, commands/, agents/, and hooks/. Ships: github-repo-analyzer (skill); learn-app + product-manager (per-repo product notebook — /learn-app builds and maintains docs/product/ from a code census + optional read-only walk, with an async question ledger the human answers in-file; the product-manager agent answers questions and writes specs from the notebook with per-claim provenance, never inventing product truth); feature-review (end-of-development multi-agent review — TDD compliance, contextual-creation UX, 10k-row scalability + security sweep, advisory architecture ideas — one verified scorecard with a per-finding HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence report, a run ledger, and a periodic-calibration process for improving precision over time); app-cartograph (map a live app into durable context — navigation + business flows + knowledge graph — via a code-seeded frontier and a write-safe human-in-the-loop walk; runs upstream of E2E); e2e-flow (gated multi-agent E2E test-generation for a single flow, web + api); and e2e-map + e2e-batch (whole-app flow census → one approval → autonomous suite generation).

Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entries.title: centauri
entries.description: A deep harness and semantic layer for LLM assistants, installable on five surfaces: Claude Code (this plugin), Claude.ai (the same skill, uploaded), any other CLI (HARNESS.md), ChatGPT and Gemini (generated instruction packs). Substantive tasks run through an orchestrator that delegates, adversarially verifies, keeps rolling summaries, and persists learnings into a semantic layer that reloads every session.

entries.title: lsp-refactor
entries.description: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

Self-hosted runner fleet design, supply chain security (SLSA/Sigstore/SBOMs), progressive delivery, DORA metrics, and cross-platform migration.

entries.description: Local, model-agnostic automatic skill injection: embeds the prompt on CPU, ranks it against your skill descriptions, and injects the matching skill only when one actually fits — via UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/SessionStart hooks. No API call, nothing leaves your machine.

entries.description: Opt-in productivity coaching for Claude Code. Use for explicit PUA/try-harder requests, user frustration after repeated failures, requests to retry or change approach, passive/low-quality work complaints, completion checks, evidence requests, test/verification reminders, and Ding-style workplace process cues. Normal calm first-attempt requests are left alone.

entries.description: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entries.title: hyperflow
entries.description: Fourteen specialized slash commands turn one Claude session into a structured multi-agent engineering pipeline. Decision agents orchestrate, triage, and review; workers execute in parallel — every agent runs on your current session model, every step is a Worker → Reviewer pair, and every non-trivial phase fans into sub-phases with their own reviewers. Auto-routing is on by default — say 'audit the diff', 'debug this test', 'large migration', or 'run a workflow' and the orchestrator routes to the right skill without the /hyperflow:* prefix. /hyperflow:workflow uses Claude Code dynamic workflows for big tasks and a portable Codex/OpenCode adapter where native workflows are unavailable; /hyperflow:plan rewrites a rough prompt into a high-quality one, asks the questions a senior engineer would, and decomposes the approach into a batched task graph; /hyperflow:dispatch fans out persona-stitched workers under per-batch and final-integration review; /hyperflow:design establishes a domain-grounded design system, researches real-world prior art, and renders it slop-free under the local taste skills. 15 composable personas, 6 adaptive flow profiles, and persistent project memory compound across sessions. Works across Codex App/CLI, Claude Code, OpenCode, Antigravity, and Cursor.

entries.title: claude-config
entries.description: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-claude-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.

Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).

entries.title: api-expert
entries.description: Expert API design, review, debugging, optimization, security auditing, spec generation, migration, and deprecation. Runs on the session model — always the strongest available Claude. Backed by embedded reference files covering architecture patterns, schema design, authentication, authorization, security hardening, client access, performance, observability, testing, inter-service communication, and API lifecycle, plus a canonical OWASP API Top 10 2023 checklist. Optionally grounds itself further with goodmem (memory) and serena (semantic code navigation) MCP servers if configured — works standalone from the embedded references if not. Handles REST/GraphQL/gRPC/tRPC/Connect, OAuth 2.1/OIDC, multi-tenancy, RFC 9457 errors, rate limiting, OTel observability, and the full API lifecycle from spec to sunset.

entries.description: Gabriel's skill collection — artifact generation, commit helpers, and more.

entries.title: skidl
entries.description: Design electronic schematics and PCB layouts using SKiDL — create circuits with Python code, validate designs, and export to KiCad.

entries.title: armada
entries.description: Autonomous Recursive Multi-Agent Development Assembler — a fleet of Claude Code skills that watch for GitHub issues and drive them to a reviewed, verified, merge-ready PR.

entries.title: plan-review
entries.description: Closed-loop plan-review gate on ExitPlanMode: Codex unknowns audit + agentic-investigation gate, with the /investigate-plan adapter (drives the Hermes investigator in the hermes container) and /waive-investigation.

entries.title: skill-manager
entries.description: Three-tier activation manager for agent assets (skills, subagents, commands, workflows): keep a large library dormant at zero context cost and activate only what each project needs, via a symlink/junction/tracked-copy ladder with drift detection and repair.

entries.title: agentflow
entries.description: Tech-stack-agnostic dev workflow for a single GitHub repo: a PO/DEV/QC agent team coordinated via GitHub issues + flow:* labels and a required GitHub Projects v2 board, with parallel /start terminals that claim work via issue assignee. Ships 4 core skills (setup-agentflow, project-board-protocol, git-flow-working, figma-design) and lets each project add role-prefixed skills (dev-*, qc-*, po-*). Fully specified connections (token + MCP server) for GitHub, GitHub Projects, and Figma, secure .env secret management, and a single-source-of-truth config describing dynamic project surfaces (any mix of backend/frontend/mobile/…).

entries.title: multi-code-review
entries.description: Consensus code review by independent models: Claude + OpenAI Codex in parallel, with optional Google Antigravity (Gemini) as a third reviewer. Findings are cross-verified and merged into one report.

entries.title: vibing-nvim
entries.description: Neovim MCP tools, skills, and subagents for vibing.nvim — lets Claude Code read/edit buffers, drive LSP, and manage windows in a running Neovim instance.

entries.title: token-optimizer
entries.description: Cuts token consumption in coding sessions by rewriting verbose commands, compressing tool output, reminding about /compact, and routing simple tasks to cheap Haiku subagents.

entries.title: kordoc
entries.description: Parse, generate, fill, patch, compare, validate, and render Korean official documents (HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, DOCX, XLS/XLSX) in Claude — 공문서 프리셋 생성, 서식 보존 빈칸 채우기, 라운드트립 패치, 조판 SVG 렌더. Powered by the kordoc npm CLI/MCP — no Hancom Office required.

entries.title: into-the-unknown
entries.description: Discover your unknowns before, during, and after implementation — blindspot passes, brainstorms, interviews, references, implementation plans/notes, pitches, and quizzes. Based on Thariq's "A Field Guide to Fable: Finding Your Unknowns".

entries.title: harness-portable
entries.description: Skill portabili cloud-safe dell'AI Harness: bibtex-conventions, major-revision-discipline, scientific-writing, diagram-design. Pensate per sessioni Claude Code on the web (VM Anthropic), zero dipendenze da ds4/Ollama/texlive/MCP locali.

entries.title: swe-docs
entries.description: Generate a complete, traceable engineering documentation suite from a project_overview.md file. Bundles two skills: project-overview (interviews you to build the overview) and project-docs (produces PRD, SRS, Contract & Invariants, Transition, Architecture, API Spec, and Visual Identity in a dependency-ordered chain).

entries.title: pm-craft
entries.description: PM craft skills: systems thinking, lean canvas, walkthroughs, explainers, mental models, stress-testing and debate

entries.title: obsidian-tools
entries.description: Obsidian vault CLI skill — vault-native search, create, tasks, daily notes, and properties via the Obsidian CLI

entries.title: claude-code-stint
entries.description: Stint plugin for Claude Code - Track Claude Code CLI and Desktop coding activity in Stint

entries.title: revenue-skills-marketplace
entries.description: A marketplace-style bundle of revenue skills for offers, sales, ads, campaigns, social media, outreach, and landing pages.

entries.title: pipecat-dev
entries.description: Development workflow skills for contributing to the Pipecat project

entries.title: gm-car-ac-revenue-os
entries.description: A free-first AI revenue operating system for GM Car A/C Service: A/C, general servicing, car electricals, competitors, ads, local SEO, WhatsApp sales, fleet outreach, and training growth.

entries.title: swiss-cheese
entries.description: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. This plugin initializes Swiss Cheese defense layers in your repository, runs a token-frugal multi-agent code review from one shared diff, works autonomously in a loop applying the layers, guides you through building custom layers, audits docs/ADRs/review style, and discovers where task knowledge lives (Jira, Redmine, MCP servers).

entries.title: knowledge-foundry
entries.description: Governed pipeline for building trusted, licensed, versioned, RAG-ready domain corpora, driven by the deterministic kf CLI. Install the CLI with: npm install -g @knowledge-foundry/cli

entries.title: shipflow
entries.description: ShipFlow for Claude Code: dedicated /shipflow-* commands (loop, status, issues, PRs, releases) plus a natural-language skill. Bundles the renaiss-shipflow CLI (no separate install) and self-updates on use.

entries.title: ai-agent-kit
entries.description: Tool-agnostic engineering skills (stacks + cross-cutting concerns) for Claude Code. The skills layer of ai-agent-kit, installable via the plugin marketplace. For full multi-tool setup (Codex + Antigravity + hooks + commands + docs scaffolding) use the install script instead.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entries.title: software-engineer
entries.description: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entries.title: hero-skills
entries.description: AI Hero agent patterns and workflows for consulting and development

entries.title: compound-bash
entries.description: Auto-approve compound bash commands when every sub-command matches your allow rules

entries.title: polars-backtest
entries.description: Polars backtest extension development helper - backtesting with polars expressions

entries.title: claude-apd
entries.description: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entries.title: unabridged
entries.description: Force complete, unabridged output — no truncation, no placeholders, no "for brevity". Triggers on phrases like "full file", "complete implementation", "no placeholders", "whole thing", "write it all out", "no skeleton".

entries.title: memory
entries.description: Cross-session decision and pattern memory — persist learnings, auto-inject relevant context on session start

entries.title: review
entries.description: Multi-perspective code review orchestrator — PR diff analysis with severity-rated findings and LGTM verdict

entries.title: solver
entries.description: Structured problem solving — decompose, iterate, constrain, or auto-pipeline with strategy recommendation

entries.title: agent
entries.description: Agent primitives and autonomous behaviors — fan-out, delegate, broadcast, research, solve, consensus, swarm for Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration

entries.title: keel
entries.description: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entries.title: maestro-code
entries.description: THE single entry point for any software task — the master router (dev-orchestrator) + code-reviewer, debugger, test-author.

entries.title: playwright
entries.description: Playwright MCP server for browser automation

entries.title: filesystem
entries.description: Filesystem MCP server for file operations

entries.title: sutra
entries.description: Orchestrator for claude-skills-pack — unifies code_assist, sb, and unabridged behind one bridged command surface. Owns the capability registry, the artifact interchange schema, the cross-plugin recall fusion, and the verify→lesson→recall feedback loop. Members stay fully standalone; sutra makes them cooperate. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, and a session hook.

entries.title: thinking
entries.description: Sequential thinking MCP server for structured problem analysis

entries.title: eval
entries.description: Agent output quality evaluation — multi-rubric scoring, strategy benchmarking, and A/B prompt experiments

entries.title: trace
entries.description: Agent execution tracing — timeline, token/cost tracking, replay, and diff for multi-agent observability

entries.title: maestro-security
entries.description: THE single entry point for any security task — the authorization-first master router (security-orchestrator) + threat-modeler, secure-code-reviewer, vuln-analyst, remediation-engineer.

entries.title: maestro-bi
entries.description: THE single entry point for any data/BI task — the master router (bi-orchestrator) + sql-analyst, metric-definer, insight-narrator, dashboard-designer.

entries.title: typescript-ui
entries.description: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: dashboard
entries.description: Web dashboard for .xm project state — visualize builds, probes, solvers, reviews, evals, humble lessons, traces, memory

entries.title: apple-ui-craft
entries.description: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven agents, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude), that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (~103,000 lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts, and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: humble
entries.description: Structured retrospective — reflect on failures together, find root causes, explore alternatives, and grow

entries.title: build
entries.description: Phase-based project harness with requirements gathering, parallel research, plan validation, DAG execution, cost forecasting, and decision memory

entries.title: op
entries.description: Strategy orchestration — 17 strategies including refine, tournament, chain, review, debate, red-team, brainstorm, distribute, council, socratic, persona, scaffold, compose, decompose, hypothesis, investigate, monitor

entries.title: maestro-finance
entries.description: THE single entry point for any finance task — the master router (finance-orchestrator) + financial-modeler, unit-economics, fpna-analyst.

entries.title: maestro-marketing
entries.description: THE single entry point for any marketing task — the master router (marketing-orchestrator) + copywriter, cta-crafter, seo-optimizer.

entries.title: sb
entries.description: Second-brain skill — captures every Claude Code conversation into a project-scoped Obsidian vault. Mines lessons, topics, tasks, kanban, and connections. Holds knowledge handed to it via a generic ingest primitive (the sutra orchestrator feeds it parsed repo artifacts). Self-healing vault-repair + project-linkage maintenance and optional auto lesson-mining. Subcommands under /sb:.

entries.title: code_assist
entries.description: Self-contained developer-workflow powerhouse: atomic commits, architectural code review, phase journals, plan/debug/verify/ADR discipline, structure audit + scaffold, release/onboard/refactor, and github/jira/slack/sonar/graph integrations. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, dedicated subagents, and session/git-guard hooks.

entries.title: probe
entries.description: Premise validation — challenge assumptions, kill bad ideas early, earn the right to build

entries.title: kit
entries.description: All-in-one x-mesh toolkit: x-build (project harness), x-op (strategy orchestration), x-agent (agent primitives), x-solver (problem solving)

entries.title: pdftomarkdown
entries.description: Lets Claude read any PDF — scanned documents, tables, multi-column layouts, CJK — by converting it to markdown with npx pdftomarkdown.

entries.title: ai-assistant
entries.description: 커스텀 Claude skills & commands 모음

entries.title: seo-kit
entries.description: Real-data SEO + GEO (LLM answer-engine citation) audit toolkit: point it at a URL for a prioritized punch list; free Tier-0 core, paid tiers opt-in.

entries.title: switcharoo
entries.description: Model-tier routing for Claude Code Max users: pushes delegable subtasks to the cheapest capable model via pinned subagents, stretching your usage limits.

entries.title: html-unknowns-workflow
entries.description: Generate HTML artifacts that expose unknowns before, during, and after implementation work.

entries.title: pr-skill
entries.description: PR description generator skill for personal use

entries.title: pywebview-mcp
entries.description: Playwright-style MCP server for pywebview apps — lets Claude see, control, and debug your Python desktop web UI without modifying your app's source code.

entries.title: unknowns
entries.description: Skills for discovering and closing knowledge gaps across the dev lifecycle, from Thariq's 'Know Your Unknowns'

entries.title: orchestra
entries.description: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.
